title: Section 20H
content: 1[20H. Salary, allowances and meetings of Authority.--(1) The salaries and allowances payable to the whole-time Chairperson and whole-time members, and the other terms and conditions of their service or fees or allowances payable to the part-time members, of the Authority shall be such as may be prescribed: Provided that neither the salary and allowances nor the other terms and conditions of service of the whole-time Chairperson and whole-time members shall be varied to their disadvantage after their appointment. (2) The Authority shall regulate its own procedure for the purposes of holding its meetings (including quorum of such meetings) and granting permissions under this Act. (3) All the decisions of the Authority shall be published in such manner as it may decide and also on its own website and on the website of the Central Government.]
